SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_OONP_OS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2007. It will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design 
with extra coverage in the gap. The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit 
(ICL) for the Part D benefit. 

The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D
